title: check-verdict v1 stub (pre-permissiveness lockstep guard)
description: v1-shape stub used by tests/test-autorun-policy.sh::test_partial_landing_rejection. The live validator (which now requires schema_version const=2 + 9 v2 fields) MUST reject any verdict matching this v1 schema. Conversely, this v1 stub MUST reject any v2-shape verdict (because schema_version const=1 + missing required v2 fields). Together this proves bidirectional lockstep: shipping a schema bump without a validator update fails CI, and shipping a verdict bump without a schema update fails CI.
